intro: Herschelia excelsa, also known as Herschelia or "Red Ivory," is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, helping to alleviate conditions such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues.
